# Shaping fixtures

- `NotoSansArabic.ttf` is Google Fonts' variable Noto Sans Arabic from commit
  `389b770410cc0b7c21c85673bfa2077420fe7f65` as fetched on 2026-07-16. SHA-256:
  `63111b5b2e074dd48cc67692e0a2726d86ee94c1c37fe8598257b7b4e87e869e`.
- `NotoSansDevanagari.ttf` is Google Fonts' variable Noto Sans Devanagari from
  commit `389b770410cc0b7c21c85673bfa2077420fe7f65` as fetched on 2026-07-16. SHA-256:
  `9ce7b04f60e363d8870e5997744cf85cf69d38a4d7d129d364d92a3b14b461d7`.

Both fixtures are distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1. Their
upstream license files are committed beside them. CMU Serif is reused from
`crates/umber-wasm/assets` and is also SIL-OFL licensed.
